text.title: AI Design Assistant Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "pattern": "review", "tool": "Figma plugin: design-system-audit", "rationale": "Agent triggered nightly; consumes a Figma file, returns rubric verdict per frame; no human-in-the-loop during the run.", "trigger_source": "scheduled", "telemetry_events": [ "accept", "reject", "ignore", "rubric_score" ], "fallback_behavior": "If Figma API is rate-limited, queue and retry; never block the editor." }

example.note: Mixed pattern; missing rationale, trigger_source, telemetry, fallback.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
